name: liepin-cli
description: 猎聘求职工具 — 在猎聘上搜索职位、投递简历、查看/编辑简历。 Use when Liepin (猎聘) workflows need the CLI—missing or expired token, unauthorized responses, first-time setup, resume fetch/update, job search or apply, choosing job-kind from search results, machine-readable JSON for parsing. 触发词: 找工作, 搜职位, 投简历, 猎聘, liepin, 求职, 招聘, 简历
